category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Malaysia) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Malaysia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入马来西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入馬來西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Malaysian requirements: Energy Commission (Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST) Certificate of Approval where in scope, SIRIM certification and label, MS IEC 62133 cell safety, EMC and MCMC type approval for wireless, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer obligation. China GB 31241 and CCC certification do not by themselves satisfy these Malaysian requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与马来西亚要求对照：能源委员会（Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST）适用范围内的批准证书、SIRIM认证及标签、MS IEC 62133电芯安全、EMC及无线产品的MCMC型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及在地进口商义务。中国GB 31241及CCC认证本身不能满足上述马来西亚要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與馬來西亞要求對照：能源委員會（Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST）適用範圍內的批准證書、SIRIM認證及標籤、MS IEC 62133電芯安全、EMC及無線產品的MCMC型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及在地進口商義務。中國GB 31241及CCC認證本身不能滿足上述馬來西亞要求。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters targeting Malaysia must obtain MS IEC 62133 cell safety testing, an Energy Commission (Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST) Certificate of Approval where the product is in scope, SIRIM QAS certification and the SIRIM label, MCMC type approval for any wireless function, and a valid UN 38.3 transport test report, with an in-country importer or registrant. None of these are satisfied by Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification.
answer_first.zh: 以马来西亚为目标市场的中国锂电池及移动电源出口商，须取得MS IEC 62133电芯安全检测、产品在适用范围内时的能源委员会（Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST）批准证书、SIRIM QAS认证及SIRIM标签、任何无线功能的MCMC型号核准，以及有效的UN 38.3运输测试报告，并须有在地进口商或注册人。上述要求均无法由中国GB 31241或CCC认证替代。
answer_first.zht: 以馬來西亞為目標市場的中國鋰電池及行動電源出口商，須取得MS IEC 62133電芯安全檢測、產品在適用範圍內時的能源委員會（Suruhanjaya Tenaga / ST）批准證書、SIRIM QAS認證及SIRIM標籤、任何無線功能的MCMC型號核准，以及有效的UN 38.3運輸測試報告，並須有在地進口商或註冊人。上述要求均無法由中國GB 31241或CCC認證替代。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon material regulatory change in Malaysia (ST / SIRIM / MCMC) or China (GB / CCC).
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. human_reviewed may only be set true after a named reviewer verifies each row against the official regulator or standards-body source.
